assertions.description: INCORRECT: IOUT1 has value 'BNC-JD11-50-LF' and lib_id 'BNC-JD11-50-LF' — it is a BNC coaxial output connector for the DAC current output signal. IOUT2 has value 'NA(HN1x2)' and lib_id 'CON2' — it is a 2-pin header. Both are classified as type 'other' because their lib_ids do not match the connector pattern recognizer. BNC-JD11-50-LF should be recognizable as a connector type. The SIG_IN1 BNC in iCE40-ADC has the same misclassification as 'switch'. These are output signal connectors for an FPGA-driven DAC board.
